skills.label: Refine Research Question
skills.description: Sharpen a question so it is focused, feasible, and researchable.

skills.label: Justify Purpose
skills.description: Explain why the inquiry matters and for whom.

skills.label: Map Literature
skills.description: Organize prior work into a coherent scholarly conversation.

skills.label: Identify Research Gap
skills.description: State what is unresolved and how the study addresses it.

skills.label: Design Method
skills.description: Choose and justify procedures aligned to the question.

skills.label: Ethics and Bias Check
skills.description: Anticipate ethical issues, consent, and bias controls.

skills.label: Interpret with Limits
skills.description: Discuss meaning while owning limitations and alternatives.

skills.label: Structure Academic Paper
skills.description: Build a clear scholarly paper architecture.

skills.label: Integrate Citations
skills.description: Weave sources with accurate attribution and commentary.

skills.label: Present Research Arc
skills.description: Tell the inquiry story for a live audience.

skills.label: Defend Orally
skills.description: Answer method, evidence, and reflection probes.

skills.label: Reflect and Iterate
skills.description: Use critique to revise question, method, or claims.
